text: Enlighten pro. Flurry faster. I speak
like a pro. [music]
>> Check in at the airport.
Hello. I need to check in for London.
>> Good morning. May I see your passport
and ticket, please?
>> Yes, here is my passport. And here is my
ticket.
>> Thank you. Do you have any bags to check
in?
>> Yes, I have one suitcase to check in.
Please put your suitcase on the scale.
>> Okay. Is it too heavy?
>> No, it's fine. Your bag is 19 kilos,
which is within the limit.
>> Great. Thank you.
>> Do you also have a carry-on bag?
>> Yes, I have this small backpack.
>> Would you like a window seat or an aisle
seat?
>> I would like a window seat, please.
>> Here is your boarding pass. Thank you.
What is the gate number?
>> The gate is B11.
Boarding starts at 10:30. Please don't
be late.
>> Gate B1
10:30. I will be on time. Thank you for
your help. Check in with excess baggage
weight.
>> Good morning. Can I see your passport
and ticket, please?
>> Here you go. I'd like to check this bag
to London. Please place it on the scale.
Oh, I'm afraid your bag weighs 25 kg.
The limit is 20 kg.
>> Is there a problem?
>> Yes, you are 5 kg over. You can either
pay an excess baggage fee or move some
items to your carry-on bag.
>> How much is the fee?
>> That's expensive. Give me a moment. I'll
move some heavy clothes into my
backpack.
a delayed flight and missing a
connection.
>> Excuse me. My flight from Paris was
delayed and I have just missed my
connection to New York.
>> I'm very sorry to hear that. Let me
check the system. Yes, I see the delay.
>> Oh, I see. What can I do now? I really
need to get there today for a meeting.
>> I can put you on a flight with a layover
in Boston.
>> What does layover mean? It means you
stop in Boston for a short time before
you go to New York.
>> Will I have to pay extra for that?
>> No, since the delay was our fault, we
will rebook you for free and provide a
meal voucher.
>> Thank you. I'll take the flight via
Boston then.
>> Asking for directions at the airport.
>> Excuse me. Where is the check-in counter
for flight BA249?
>> Hello. Flight BA249
is at counter 5.
>> Counter 5. Thank you. Is it far?
>> No, it's nearby. Go straight ahead and
turn left.
>> Go straight and turn left. Thank you
very much.
Excuse me. Could you help me, please?
>> Yes, of course. What do you need?
>> Where can I find the departure board?
>> The departure board is right behind you.
>> Oh, I see it now. Thank you very much.
Excuse me. Where is gate B12?
>> Gate B12. Let me check.
>> Thank you. Gate B12 is now gate C5.
There is a gate change.
>> Gate C5.
Oh no. Is it far?
>> Yes, it is a little far. Take the train
to terminal C.
>> The train to terminal C. Okay. Is the
flight on time?
>> No, the flight is delayed. New boarding
time is 11:00 a.m.
>> Delayed until 11 a.m. Gate C5.
Thank you for the information
at the security check.
Hello.
>> Good afternoon. May I see your boarding
pass, please?
>> Yes, here is my boarding pass.
>> Please take off your jacket and belt.
Take off my jacket and my belt. Okay.
>> Please put your bag and laptop in the
tray.
>> My bag and laptop in the tray like this.
>> Yes, that's fine.
>> Do I need to take off my watch?
>> Yes, please put it in the tray.
>> What about liquids like water?
>> You cannot take that water with you. You
have to throw it away.
>> What about snacks? Are they allowed?
>> Yes, but only a small amount. Now,
please walk through the scanner.
>> Okay.
>> Please step back. Do you have anything
in your pockets?
>> Oh, my phone. Sorry.
>> Please put your phone in the tray. Thank
you. You can go now.
Boarding the plane.
Hello, I am Anna. Here is my boarding
pass.
>> Hello Anna, welcome. May I see your
passport as well, please?
>> Yes, of course. Here is my passport.
>> Thank you. You are in seat 14A.
>> Seat 14A. Is that a window seat?
>> Yes, it is a window seat.
>> Great. Thank you.
>> You're welcome. Do you have only a
carry-on bag?
>> Yes, just this small backpack.
>> That's fine. You can keep it with you.
>> Okay. Where do I board the plane?
>> Please go straight ahead and turn right.
The plane is boarding now.
>> Thank you. Do I need to board now or can
I wait?
>> You can board now. Your group is
boarding.
Okay. How long is the flight?
>> The flight is about 2 hours.
>> Thank you very much.
>> You're welcome. Have a good flight.
>> On the plane. Hello. Would you like
something to drink? We have water,
juice, or coffee.
>> Yes, I'd like some water, please.
>> Of course. Here's your water.
>> Thank you very much.
>> You're welcome. Would you like a snack
as well? We have sandwiches or cookies.
>> A sandwich would be great. Thank you.
>> Here you go. Enjoy your snack.
>> Thank you.
Excuse me. Where is the restroom?
>> The restroom is in the back of the
plane.
>> In the back. Thank you.
Excuse me. Can you help me?
>> Yes. How can I help?
>> I feel cold. Can I have a blanket? Of
course. Here's a blanket.
>> Thank you very much.
>> At passport control immigration.
>> Good afternoon.
>> Hello. May I see your passport, please?
>> Yes, here is my passport.
>> Thank you. What is the purpose of your
visit?
>> I am here for a holiday. I will stay for
1 week.
>> How long will you stay in the country?
>> I will stay for 7 days.
Where will you stay during your visit?
>> I will stay at the Grand Hotel.
>> Do you have a return ticket?
>> Yes, I do. My return flight is next
Friday.
>> Are you traveling alone?
>> Yes, I am traveling alone.
>> Do you have anything to declare?
>> No, I don't.
>> Very well. Enjoy your stay.
>> Thank you very much.
>> Lost luggage at the destination.
Hello. I was on flight QR123
from Dubai, but my luggage hasn't come
out on the carousel.
>> I'm sorry for the inconvenience. Can I
have your baggage claim tag? It's
usually stuck to the back of your
boarding pass.
>> Here it is. It's a large silver hard
shell suitcase with a red ribbon on the
handle.
>> I'm typing.
It looks like your bag wasn't loaded
onto the plane in time. It's still in
Dubai.
>> This is very frustrating. I have all my
work clothes in there. When will it
arrive?
>> It should be on the next flight tonight.
If you provide your hotel address, we
will deliver it to you tomorrow morning.
>> Okay. Please make sure it gets there.
Here is my contact information.
>> Taking a taxi to the hotel.
Hello. I need a taxi to the Grand Hotel,
please.
>> Hello. The Grand Hotel?
>> Yes, of course. Please get in.
>> Thank you.
How long will it take to get to the
Grand Hotel?
>> About 30 minutes. The traffic is late
right now.
>> That's good. How much will it cost?
>> The price will be about $45.
>> Okay. Is that a fixed price or does the
meter run?
>> The meter will run, but it should be
around $45.
>> All right. Can I pay by credit card or
is it cash only?
>> You can pay by credit card or cash.
>> Great. Thank you. Could you please turn
on the air conditioning?
>> Yes, no problem.
>> Thank you.
Checking in at the hotel.
Hello, I have a reservation. My name is
Anna.
>> Hello Anna. Welcome to the Grand Hotel.
Can I see your passport, please?
>> Yes. Here is my passport.
>> Thank you. Your room is 405.
Here is your key card.
>> Room 405.
Thank you. Can I ask about the hotel
facilities?
>> Of course. What do you need?
Is there free wifi?
>> Yes, the Wi-Fi is free. The password is
on your key card holder.
>> Good. And where is breakfast?
>> Breakfast is on the first floor from 7
to 10.
>> First floor, 7 to 10. Thank you. Is
there an elevator?
>> Yes, the elevator is to your right.
Excuse me. How do I get to the gym?
>> The gym is on the fifth floor. Take the
elevator to the fifth floor.
>> Fifth floor.
>> Yes. Turn right when you exit the
elevator. It is next to the pool.
>> Right. Next to the pool. Thank you.
Hello. I have a problem in my room. 405.
>> I am sorry to hear that. What is the
problem? The air conditioning is not
working. It is very hot.
>> I am sorry. I will send someone to fix
it now.
>> Thank you.
